ABOUT.TITLE: About us
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: IPNote.ir — an NTK product for IP lookup, notes, and network tools
ABOUT.PRODUCT_BODY: IPNote.ir helps you inspect your public IP, network details, personal IP notes, and DNS/WHOIS utilities. It is built for technicians, network admins, and developers on web and mobile (PWA).
ABOUT.FEATURE_LOOKUP: IP lookup with geo, ASN, PTR, and approximate map
ABOUT.FEATURE_NOTES: Personal IP notes with device and network snapshot metadata
ABOUT.FEATURE_TOOLS: DNS, WHOIS, port check, SSL, subnet, and compare tools
ABOUT.FEATURE_PWA: Installable PWA with light/dark theme support
ABOUT.NTK_BODY: NTK (ntk.ir) has operated since 2008 in software development, network security, and web hosting. IPNote.ir is part of the NTK / karavi.ca ecosystem focused on practical IT and digital solutions.
ABOUT.AUTHOR_BODY: Alireza Karavi is a web and application developer with a strong focus on networking and security. Education: BEng, MEng, MBA. Long track record in CMS, .NET, Angular, MikroTik, VoIP, and hosting.
ABOUT.AUTHOR_SKILL_3: Product and project leadership across NTK, ntkhost, and related ventures
ABOUT.ECOSYSTEM_HINT: Selected brands and services in the NTK / Karavi ecosystem:

COPYRIGHT.LICENSE_ITEM_1: Use the service for unlawful activity, network abuse, or privacy violations
COPYRIGHT.LICENSE_ITEM_2: Overload APIs or endpoints beyond published rate limits
COPYRIGHT.LICENSE_ITEM_3: Claim ownership of another user's authenticated notes (notes belong to the account holder)
COPYRIGHT.TRADEMARKS_BODY: IPNote.ir, NTK, ntk.ir, and the IP logo are trade names or marks associated with NTK. Other names and logos belong to their respective owners.
COPYRIGHT.THIRD_PARTY_BODY: Some data is fetched from external providers. IPNote.ir is not responsible for their accuracy, availability, or policies:
COPYRIGHT.THIRD_PARTY_ITEM_2: OpenStreetMap tiles and related map services
COPYRIGHT.PRIVACY_BODY: Your public IP is used to provide lookup services. IP notes are visible only to the authenticated owner. Contact support by email to request data removal.
